spec.objective: Add the CodexProviderSecretRef field to ProjectSpec in api/v1alpha1/project_types.go, mirroring the existing providerSecretRef field. The new field is a string carrying the same-namespace K8s Secret name that holds OPENAI_API_KEY or CODEX_API_KEY for dispatch Jobs running on the openai vendor. Add a +kubebuilder:validation:Optional marker and an inline doc comment referencing the D3 credential path decision (Secret-ref only, never the key bytes; no headless OAuth). Run make generate to regenerate api/v1alpha1/zz_generated.deepcopy.go. Confirm the api/v1alpha1 schema test (phase3_schema_test.go or equivalent) still passes. No controller, chart, or cmd/ changes in this plan.
